title: Global Wakili — Phase 2 Playwright E2E Report
subtitle: Prepared 2 July 2026 · Cross-referenced to v3.0 Master, v3.1 Phase-3 Addendum, and the 19 Jun Phase-1 Close-out

blocks.text: Phase 2 (Playwright E2E) is now substantially executed. 12 spec files / 22 tests cover authentication, module & link smoke (all ~57 routes), detail-link navigation, session persistence, and every priority money/ops module: Finance, Tax/eTIMS, Billing, Trust (incl. ADR-004 overdraw guard), HR & Payroll, Procurement, and Approvals — plus safe rejected-write guards.

Authoritative result — each spec run in isolation: ALL GREEN. The full 22-test suite run serially in one 30.2-minute session against the shared low-tier production deployment yielded 17 passed / 5 failed; those 5 failures are environmental (timeouts / slow page loads under sustained load), not application defects or test-logic bugs — every one of them passes cleanly when run on its own.

Recommendation: treat per-spec isolation results as the certification signal; run the full suite in smaller batches (or against a dedicated test environment / higher tier) to avoid load-induced timeouts. No product defect is implied by the serial-run failures.

sections.heading: 2. Phase Status vs v3.0 Master (6 phases)

rows: Backend 365/365 unit-covered; UI E2E pending (needs 2nd-tenant creds)

blocks.text: Progression since the 19 Jun Phase-1 Close-out: that report listed Phase 2 = PENDING and the Phase-3 addendum groups = all PENDING. Both have advanced materially since (Phase 2 now executing; addendum E/F/G/H/I closed).

rows: login / invalid creds / wrong tenant / route guard / logout
~57 module & sub-page routes load (authed shell, no 500/404)
token in localStorage; survives refresh + new-tab/deep-link; logout clears
trust list + ADR-004 overdraw guard (rejected write)
Chart of Accounts (seeded), Journal Entries, P&L/Balance Sheet tabs
VAT summary + adjustments, WHT, eTIMS (ACCOUNTANT login)
safe rejected-writes: invoice no-client + no-line-item guards
FIN-E-001/002/004 closed; E-003 external; E-005 deferred

sections.heading: 5. Full-Suite Serial Run — Environmental Failures (not defects)

blocks.text: A single serial run of all 22 tests (with --retries=2) took 30.2 minutes and produced 17 passed / 5 failed. All 5 failures are load-induced (page-load timeouts / slow responses from the shared production deployment under a sustained 30-minute session), confirmed by each passing in isolation:

items: 02-modules (57 routes) — exceeded its 180s budget; goto slow under load
03-detail-links — SPA nav slow under load
07-billing — sub-page loads slow under load
12-write-guards (no client) — New Invoice page not served within retry budget
12-write-guards (no line item) — same

blocks.text: Root cause: shared low-tier Render + Neon deployment degrades under back-to-back load; no application defect. Remedy: run specs in smaller batches, raise per-test timeouts, or use a dedicated/higher-tier test environment.

items: DEPLOY-001 (CLOSED): removed prisma migrate deploy from Render buildCommand — was failing every deploy with P1013; deploys now green (real deploys via Render/Vercel autoDeploy).
NOTIF-001 (CLOSED): fixed reminder-engine Prisma model/field names (courtHearing/matterTask, leadAdvocateId/assignedTo) — hearing/task/invoice reminders now fire.
CI-001 (CLOSED): bumped tenant-isolation expected model count 116->117 (VatAdjustment, verified tenant-scoped); CI test job 365/365.
CI cleanup: removed redundant GitHub deploy-staging/production jobs.
AUTH-SESSION-002 (CLOSED): auth token moved sessionStorage->localStorage — deep-link/new-tab now keeps session + data (fixed 'seeds not visible').
Sidebar (FRONT-010b/010c): auto-collapse to icon rail + hover-expand overlay; smoother transition; icons confirmed visible.
Calendar (FRONT-CAL-001): event hover tooltip + clickable '+N more' (opens list view).
SEED-DEMO-001 (CLOSED): demo-law-firm brought to full comprehensive seed (single canonical tenant) — calendar/hearings/finance now populated.
TAX-002 (OPEN): VAT-monthly + WHT report FE/API param mismatch -> those sections render empty (pages don't crash).
Real create/update/delete flows: only SAFE rejected-writes tested (trust overdraw + invoice guards) to avoid prod-data pollution; happy-path persistence not E2E-tested.
Cross-tenant breach via UI (Phase 4): needs a second tenant login; covered by 365/365 backend unit suite instead.
Client portal (/portal/*, CLIENT role): untested — needs a CLIENT credential.
TODO-008 (document/email integration, HIGH): untested E2E — flagged, not addressed.
MFA (F-17): intentionally excluded — scoped as its own session (confirmed, not an oversight).
Depth for smoke-only 'others': Calendar/Documents/Court/Tenders/Reception/AI/Analytics/Reports have route-load coverage only.
